lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.title: Saros Release Date
lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.intro: Saros moved from a broad 2026 window to a dated launch plan, then to the final April schedule. This timeline gives a fast, reliable view of each milestone from reveal to full release.

steps.title: February 12, 2025: Saros Announced for 2026
steps.description: Housemarque introduced Saros for PlayStation 5 and PlayStation 5 Pro, with Arjun Devraj and Carcosa presented as the core setup.

steps.title: September 24, 2025: First Dated Saros Release Window
steps.description: The gameplay reveal set an initial March 20, 2026 launch target before the date was later revised in follow-up communication.

steps.title: December 11, 2025: Saros Date Updated to April 30
steps.description: Housemarque confirmed April 30, 2026 as the new release date and opened Saros pre-orders on the same announcement cycle.

steps.title: April 28, 2026: Saros Digital Deluxe Early Access
steps.description: The Saros Digital Deluxe package includes a 48-hour early access window ahead of the standard global launch.

steps.title: April 30, 2026: Saros Full Release
steps.description: The official Saros FAQ and store pages align on April 30, 2026 as the full launch date for the base edition.

quickTips: Track Saros launch updates through PlayStation Blog and official game pages first.
Saros pre-order and early access timing can differ by edition, so check edition details before purchase.
Saros rollout messages are easiest to follow in a timeline format because dates were revised during promotion.
Saros launch-day planning is simpler if you separate early-access timing from standard-edition timing.

lucidBlocksApotheosisCrafting.title: Saros Trailer
lucidBlocksApotheosisCrafting.intro: Saros trailer coverage now spans reveal mood, gameplay mechanics, story emphasis, and launch-window messaging. Watching in sequence gives the cleanest picture of how Saros has been presented.

cards.name: Saros Cinematic Announce Trailer
cards.description: The first Saros reveal establishes Arjun Devraj, the eclipse over Carcosa, and the game tone before deep combat footage appears.

cards.name: Saros Gameplay Reveal Trailer
cards.description: This Saros trailer introduces dash mobility, projectile-heavy pressure, Soltari Shield usage, and power-weapon conversion in active encounters.

cards.name: Saros Pre-Order Trailer
cards.description: Released with the date update, this Saros cut adds stronger story framing and cast-focused moments while reinforcing launch messaging.

cards.name: Saros Gameplay Overview Trailer
cards.description: A compact Saros systems recap highlighting progression structure, planet hazards, and key combat hooks from longer demonstrations.

cards.name: Saros Preview Trailer
cards.description: This Saros launch-window promo tightens focus on release momentum, PS5 branding, and edition visibility for new players.

lucidBlocksToolsAndWeapons.title: Saros Gameplay Overview
lucidBlocksToolsAndWeapons.intro: Saros gameplay has enough official detail to map the full run loop: loadout setup, aggressive bullet pressure, progression at The Passage, and biome escalation under eclipse conditions.

items.name: Saros Run Setup and Loadout Choice
items.description: Each Saros run starts with weapon and perk decisions across Soltari and alien gear options, shaping your risk profile before combat begins.

items.name: Saros Soltari Shield Conversion Loop
items.description: Saros lets Arjun absorb blue projectiles with the shield, store energy, and convert that pressure into power-weapon burst damage.

items.name: Saros Power Weapon Windows
items.description: Major Saros encounters reward clean timing windows where stored shield energy can flip defensive phases into high-offense moments.

items.name: Saros Passage and Armor Matrix
items.description: The Saros hub supports persistent progression through Armor Matrix upgrades and narrative interactions between high-pressure runs.

items.name: Saros Eclipse Escalation Risk Layer
items.description: Saros eclipse triggers raise danger through corrupted attacks while increasing rewards, creating meaningful run-level decisions.

items.name: Saros Biomes and Boss Phase Design
items.description: Saros previews show distinct biome identities and multi-phase boss pacing built around movement reads, projectile discipline, and adaptation.

lucidBlocksStorageAndInventory.title: Saros Story and Setting
lucidBlocksStorageAndInventory.intro: Saros worldbuilding centers on Carcosa, a lost colony mystery, and a repeat-death structure tied directly to both narrative delivery and long-term progression.

solutions.name: Saros Core Premise
solutions.description: Saros frames a haunting mission on Carcosa under an eclipse, where rebuilding a future comes with personal and strategic cost.

solutions.name: Saros Protagonist: Arjun Devraj
solutions.description: Arjun Devraj drives the Saros narrative, combining combat expertise with a mission thread that connects survival, discovery, and consequence.

solutions.name: Saros Planet: Carcosa
solutions.description: Carcosa is a shifting alien environment in Saros, defined by ruins, hostile life, legacy systems, and repeated uncertainty between runs.

solutions.name: Saros Hub: The Passage
solutions.description: The Passage in Saros acts as a return point for story beats, crew interactions, and progression planning before the next expedition.

solutions.name: Saros Death-Return Loop
solutions.description: Saros uses resurrection as both a story mechanic and gameplay backbone, making each failure part of broader forward momentum.

solutions.name: Saros Delivery Methods
solutions.description: Saros storytelling blends cinematics, voice-over, logs, NPC dialogue, and environmental clues to reveal context over repeated runs.

managementTips: Read Saros story clues together with gameplay systems, because narrative and progression are designed as one loop.
Use Saros trailer order to understand how tone and plot emphasis evolved before launch.
Track Saros cast reveals alongside story beats to follow character relationships clearly.
Use The Passage scenes in Saros as checkpoints for both lore understanding and upgrade planning.

lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.title: Saros Platforms
lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.intro: Saros launches on April 30, 2026 as a PlayStation 5 release. Official updates also detail PS5 Pro enhancements, while the FAQ confirms Saros is not available on PlayStation 4.

cards.name: Saros Platform: PlayStation 5
cards.description: Status: Confirmed. Release: April 30, 2026. Official listing presents Saros as a single-player action title launching on PlayStation 5.

cards.name: Saros Platform: PlayStation 5 Pro
cards.description: Status: Enhanced. Release: April 30, 2026. Housemarque details upgraded PSSR, higher base render resolution, evolved 3D audio, adaptive triggers, and stronger haptic feedback.

cards.name: Saros Platform: PlayStation 4
cards.description: Status: Not available. Release: Not announced. The official Saros FAQ states the game is exclusive to PS5 consoles and is not available on PS4.

lucidBlocksWorldRegions.title: Saros PC and Steam Status
lucidBlocksWorldRegions.intro: Current public launch plans for Saros are centered on PlayStation 5. Official materials confirm the PS5 release date, while public PC and Steam launch details are not announced.

regions.name: Saros PC Version Status
regions.description: No PC version is confirmed. Official PlayStation materials currently list Saros only for PlayStation 5 launch plans.

regions.name: Saros Steam Release Date Status
regions.description: No Steam release date is announced. The only confirmed public release date is April 30, 2026 for PlayStation 5.

regions.name: Saros Confirmed Launch Scope
regions.description: Saros launches on PlayStation 5 on April 30, 2026. Official feature updates also describe PS5 Pro enhancements including upgraded PSSR, higher base render resolution, 3D audio, adaptive triggers, and haptics.

regions.name: Saros Official FAQ Platform Scope
regions.description: The Saros FAQ describes the game as a single-player action title, confirms PS5 exclusivity, and states that Saros is not available on PS4.

lucidBlocksCreaturesAndEnemies.title: Saros Pre-Order and Editions
lucidBlocksCreaturesAndEnemies.intro: Saros has two digital editions on PlayStation Store. Both include the full game and the same pre-order armor bonus, while Digital Deluxe adds extra armor sets and 48-hour early access.

creatures.name: Saros Standard Edition
creatures.description: Saros Standard Edition includes the full game plus the shared pre-order Hands of Shore Armor bonus.

creatures.name: Saros Digital Deluxe Edition
creatures.description: Saros Digital Deluxe includes the full game, Astra Armor, Onryo Armor, Midgard Armor, 48-hour early access, and the same pre-order Hands of Shore Armor bonus.

creatures.name: Saros Pre-Order Bonus
creatures.description: Any Saros pre-order includes the Hands of Shore Armor bonus, regardless of whether you choose Standard or Digital Deluxe.

lucidBlocksMobilityGear.title: Saros News
lucidBlocksMobilityGear.intro: This Saros timeline highlights major updates in chronological order, from the first reveal to the latest PS5 Pro technical breakdown before launch.

items.name: Saros News | April 16, 2026: PS5 and PS5 Pro Features Detailed
items.description: Housemarque detailed upgraded PSSR, higher base render resolution on PS5 Pro, evolved 3D audio, adaptive trigger behavior, and haptic feedback improvements.

items.name: Saros News | March 26, 2026: Hands-On Report Published
items.description: A three-hour Saros preview covered the first two biomes, Soltari Shield usage, eclipse risk-reward events, and permanent upgrades through the Armor Matrix.

items.name: Saros News | February 12, 2026: Eclipse Escalation Gameplay Revealed
items.description: The update explained The Passage hub, armor customization paths, challenge modifiers, and how eclipse events reshape Saros runs on Carcosa.

items.name: Saros News | December 11, 2025: April 30 Launch Confirmed
items.description: A new trailer confirmed Saros launches on April 30, 2026, opened pre-orders, and expanded the story setup around Arjun Devraj and Carcosa.

items.name: Saros News | September 25, 2025: Extended Gameplay Shared
items.description: Housemarque published a deeper Saros gameplay update and, at that time, announced a March 20, 2026 launch target before the later move to April 30.

items.name: Saros News | February 13, 2025: Saros Officially Announced
items.description: Housemarque introduced Saros as a new IP, confirmed PS5 and PS5 Pro plans, revealed Arjun Devraj, and explained permanent progression after each death.

unlockMilestones: Saros PS5 Pro Technical Update Added

lucidBlocksFarmingAndGrowth.title: Saros Combat Guide
lucidBlocksFarmingAndGrowth.intro: Saros combat emphasizes active movement, projectile conversion, and controlled aggression. The goal is to turn enemy pressure into your own advantage loop.

sections.name: Saros Movement Discipline
sections.description: Use Saros dash timing to reposition early instead of reacting late, especially when projectile density starts stacking.

sections.name: Saros Shield Absorption Timing
sections.description: Absorb valid Saros projectile patterns with the Soltari Shield to bank energy instead of spending every window on pure evasion.

sections.name: Saros Power Weapon Conversion
sections.description: Spend stored Saros shield energy in high-value windows against elites and boss phase transitions.

sections.name: Saros Mid-Range Engagement
sections.description: Saros combat rewards staying active at controllable mid-range where dodge lines, target priority, and counter windows stay readable.

sections.name: Saros Biome Threat Control
sections.description: Adjust Saros tempo by biome state: push when patterns are stable and slow down when corruption pressure rises.

sections.name: Saros Boss Phase Management
sections.description: Read Saros boss phases in chunks, protecting resources early and committing burst damage when pattern confidence is high.

lucidBlocksBestEarlyUnlocks.title: Saros Progression System
lucidBlocksBestEarlyUnlocks.intro: Saros progression is built around permanent advancement between runs, with The Passage and Armor Matrix forming the backbone of long-term strength growth.

priorities.name: Saros Passage Upgrade Routing
priorities.description: Prioritize Saros Passage systems that improve run-to-run consistency before chasing narrower situational upgrades.

priorities.name: Saros Armor Matrix Baseline
priorities.description: Secure Saros Armor Matrix fundamentals early to stabilize survivability and give each run stronger recovery options.

priorities.name: Saros Second Chance Planning
priorities.description: Use Saros Second Chance mechanics as part of a planned route, not as emergency-only fallback behavior.

priorities.name: Saros Weapon Persistence Value
priorities.description: Leverage Saros weapon carryover rules to reduce reset friction and maintain momentum across repeated attempts.

priorities.name: Saros Eclipse Reward Control
priorities.description: Balance Saros eclipse risk against your current build strength instead of forcing escalation every run.

priorities.name: Saros Lucenite Investment Order
priorities.description: Spend Saros Lucenite on upgrades that lift core consistency first, then branch into specialized optimization paths.

lucidBlocksAchievementTracker.title: Saros Difficulty and Run Length
lucidBlocksAchievementTracker.intro: Saros is designed around repeatable runs, increasing danger states, and stronger recovery tools than traditional one-shot progression loops.

achievements.title: Saros Typical Run Window
achievements.description: Preview messaging points to compact run pacing that stays easier to schedule for regular sessions.

achievements.title: Saros Session Planning
achievements.description: Saros supports shorter strategic sessions by preserving meaningful progression across repeated attempts.

achievements.title: Saros Momentum Across Runs
achievements.description: Run value in Saros is cumulative when upgrades, route knowledge, and build confidence are tracked together.

achievements.title: Saros Pattern Learning Curve
achievements.description: Difficulty in Saros improves quickly when enemy pattern reads and shield usage become consistent.

achievements.title: Saros Escalation Decision Layer
achievements.description: Eclipse escalation lets Saros players tune risk for reward instead of following one fixed pressure curve.

achievements.title: Saros Recovery Tools
achievements.description: Persistent progression gives Saros a smoother difficulty ramp over long-term play than pure reset systems.

achievements.title: Saros Loadout Consistency
achievements.description: Use repeatable starting loadouts until core encounter reads are stable under pressure.

achievements.title: Saros Boss Prep Focus
achievements.description: Treat boss practice in Saros as phase-based repetition, not one-run all-in execution.

achievements.title: Saros Progress Tracking
achievements.description: Track build outcomes after each run to identify where risk decisions improve or reduce consistency.

lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.title: Saros Eclipse System
lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.intro: The Saros eclipse system is a defining gameplay layer that changes encounter pressure, resource value, and run-level decisions.

faqs.question: What is the Saros eclipse escalation system?
faqs.answer: The Saros eclipse escalation system increases danger inside a biome while boosting reward potential for players who accept the added pressure.

faqs.question: How does the Saros eclipse affect enemy attacks?
faqs.answer: During Saros eclipse states, corrupted projectile behavior and encounter density can increase, forcing cleaner movement and shield discipline.

faqs.question: Why should I trigger a Saros eclipse run?
faqs.answer: A Saros eclipse run can improve resource gains and expose higher-value combat opportunities when your build is ready for elevated risk.

faqs.question: How does Saros connect eclipse mechanics to progression?
faqs.answer: Saros links eclipse-level risk with long-term growth decisions, so escalation affects both immediate run outcomes and persistent development paths.

faqs.question: Can I avoid Saros eclipse pressure when needed?
faqs.answer: Yes, Saros progression planning lets you manage when to push eclipse intensity and when to prioritize safer consistency routes.

faqs.question: What is the best Saros eclipse strategy for new players?
faqs.answer: Start Saros eclipse escalation only after your base survivability loop is stable, then increase risk gradually while tracking return value.

lucidBlocksSteamDeckAndController.title: Saros Characters and Cast
lucidBlocksSteamDeckAndController.intro: Saros character coverage blends protagonist motivation, supporting cast reveals, and performance details that shape tone and narrative weight.

faqs.question: Who is the Saros protagonist?
faqs.answer: Saros follows Arjun Devraj, the lead character sent into Carcosa to investigate a hostile colony situation under eclipse conditions.

faqs.question: How is Rahul Kohli connected to Saros?
faqs.answer: Rahul Kohli performs Arjun Devraj in Saros, anchoring the main perspective across both combat and narrative sequences.

faqs.question: Which supporting names are confirmed in Saros materials?
faqs.answer: Saros official communication has referenced key names including Nitya Chandran and ensemble members such as Sheridan Bouchard.

faqs.question: How does Saros present character relationships?
faqs.answer: Saros develops character context through cinematics, dialogue, logs, and hub interactions between expeditions.

faqs.question: Why does the Saros cast matter for gameplay understanding?
faqs.answer: Character context in Saros supports mission goals, progression motivation, and emotional framing for repeated high-stakes runs.

faqs.question: Where should I track new Saros cast updates?
faqs.answer: Track Saros cast updates via official trailers, PlayStation Blog posts, and developer communications tied to release milestones.

lucidBlocksSettingsAndAccessibility.title: Saros Returnal Comparison
lucidBlocksSettingsAndAccessibility.intro: Saros shares Housemarque action DNA with Returnal, but current official previews position Saros as a distinct progression and pacing design direction.

settings.name: Saros vs Returnal Combat Rhythm
settings.description: Saros keeps projectile intensity but adds a stronger shield-conversion loop that emphasizes turning defense into offense.

settings.name: Saros vs Returnal Progression Model
settings.description: Saros places more emphasis on permanent progression layers, reducing full-reset friction across repeated attempts.

settings.name: Saros vs Returnal Run Duration
settings.description: Preview commentary indicates Saros is tuned toward more compact run pacing with clearer session boundaries.

settings.name: Saros vs Returnal Narrative Delivery
settings.description: Saros positions a named protagonist and explicit cast framing earlier in the player journey.

settings.name: Saros vs Returnal Risk Layer
settings.description: Saros eclipse escalation creates a direct risk-reward toggle that players can factor into build and route planning.

settings.name: Saros vs Returnal Entry Curve
settings.description: Saros messaging highlights progression continuity designed to keep momentum for players balancing challenge with steady advancement.

lucidBlocksUpdatesAndPatchNotes.title: Saros Multiplayer and Co-Op
lucidBlocksUpdatesAndPatchNotes.intro: Saros multiplayer questions are common, so this section keeps the current single-player scope clear and prevents confusion during launch coverage.

entries.title: Saros Is Positioned as a Single-Player Game
entries.description: Current Saros official messaging presents the game as a focused single-player action experience.

entries.title: Saros Co-Op Is Not Announced for Launch
entries.description: There is no published Saros launch plan for cooperative multiplayer modes in the official release framing.

entries.title: Saros Core Loop Does Not Depend on Matchmaking
entries.description: Saros progression and combat systems are framed around solo run structure rather than networked team play.

entries.title: Saros Communication Prioritizes Story and Combat
entries.description: Saros launch communication emphasizes narrative, progression, and hardware features over online service features.

entries.title: Saros Future Mode Updates Should Be Tracked by Channel
entries.description: If Saros mode scope changes later, official game pages and PlayStation Blog updates will be the fastest primary source.

lucidBlocksCrashFixAndTroubleshooting.title: Saros PS5 Pro Features
lucidBlocksCrashFixAndTroubleshooting.intro: Saros PS5 Pro coverage focuses on visual clarity, smooth action response, and immersion upgrades built for high-tempo combat readability.

steps.title: Saros PS5 Pro Rendering Clarity
steps.description: Saros PS5 Pro feature messaging highlights clearer image output paths intended to preserve detail in dense combat scenes.

steps.title: Saros PSSR Integration Focus
steps.description: Saros technical updates reference PSSR-based enhancement goals for improved resolution presentation with stable readability.

steps.title: Saros 60fps-Oriented Gameplay Target
steps.description: Saros action pacing benefits from high frame-rate targets designed to support reaction timing and projectile tracking.

steps.title: Saros DualSense and 3D Audio Layer
steps.description: Saros on PS5 family hardware uses controller haptics, adaptive triggers, and spatial audio cues for stronger encounter awareness.

steps.title: Saros Load Flow and Session Pace
steps.description: Fast-loading expectations in Saros support repeat-run structure by minimizing downtime between deaths, upgrades, and redeployment.

faq.title: Saros Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know to start and follow Saros.

questions.question: When is the Saros release date?
questions.answer: Saros is scheduled for full release on April 30, 2026, with earlier access tied to the Digital Deluxe package.

questions.question: Where can I play Saros at launch?
questions.answer: Saros launch platform messaging is centered on PlayStation 5 and PlayStation 5 Pro.

questions.question: What makes Saros combat different?
questions.answer: Saros emphasizes projectile pressure, aggressive movement, and a shield-to-power conversion loop during high-intensity encounters.

questions.question: How does Saros progression work after death?
questions.answer: Saros uses persistent progression systems so repeated runs continue building long-term strength and options.

questions.question: Is Saros a multiplayer or co-op game?
questions.answer: Saros is currently presented as a single-player action experience in official launch communication.

questions.question: What are the main Saros PS5 Pro features?
questions.answer: Saros PS5 Pro messaging highlights enhanced clarity, performance-focused action response, and stronger immersion features.
